вң… Transcribes audio messages from Telegram using whisper.cpp or qwen-asr
вң… Handles audio downloading and conversion to WAV
вң… Streams transcription results back to Telegram as they are generated
вң… Manages ASR processing queue to balance latency and throughput
вң… Dynamically switches between faster and better ASR models based on queue length
вң… Configurable limits for queue size, audio duration, and message length

рҹ”Қ 0 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Whisperbot is a Telegram bot written in C that transcribes audio messages into text using either whisper.cpp or qwen-asr as the backend. It handles audio conversion, transcription processing, and streams the text back to the user, with options for managing queue length and model selection for performance.

вң… Industrial-grade Audio Event Detection (AED)

вң… Detects speech, singing, and music
вң… Supports non-streaming and streaming VAD
вң… Supports non-streaming AED

FireRedVAD is a state-of-the-art Voice Activity Detection (VAD) and Audio Event Detection (AED) solution. It supports over 100 languages for speech, singing, and music detection, offering both streaming and non-streaming capabilities. The system achieves high accuracy, outperforming existing VAD solutions on benchmark datasets.

вң… Dual Challenge Support (Challenge and Turnstile)

вң… Humanization features

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

This Python repository provides an asynchronous solution for bypassing Cloudflare's anti-bot challenges, specifically Turnstile and Challenge types. It aims to automate the process of obtaining necessary cookies or tokens, supporting features like proxy usage and realistic browser fingerprinting for stealth.

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… CLI utility for network profile switching on Windows
вң… Store network configurations as named profiles in JSON
вң… Apply profiles with a single command (e.g., `netsnap apply work`)
вң… Supports static IP, DHCP, gateway, and DNS settings
вң… Uses `netsh` for applying settings and WMI for reading current state
вң… Requires administrator privileges to modify network settings

вӯҗ 4 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 2 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 4 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

netsnap is a command-line utility for Windows that simplifies switching between pre-configured network profiles. It allows users to save and apply different network settings (IP address, gateway, DNS) with a single command, eliminating the need for manual configuration through the GUI.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

RetroAssembly is a web-based personal retro game collection cabinet that allows users to play classic games directly in their browser. It features a visually appealing library display with auto-detected box arts, save/load functionality, rewind capabilities, and intuitive spatial navigation for browsing games.
